task_description: Implement 8 new clinical/operational features for CareVista: NHS NEWS2 Auto-Calculator, Wound Photography Timeline, Infection Outbreak Tracker, Continence Assessment Tool, Smart Rota Builder (AI), Natural Language Search, Automated Risk Assessments, and Medication Interaction Checker. Full stack implementation including database migrations, backend API controllers/routes, and frontend pages integrated into navigation.

verification.summary: Frontend builds successfully (vite produces dist/). Backend has only pre-existing TS errors from files not touched by this task (auth.controller.ts, photos.controller.ts, upload.ts). All new controllers, pages, types, hooks, and routes compile cleanly. No test framework exists in this project.
